sourceNotes: Anafi second low/no-source batch 2026-05-27: Anafi.gr lists Klisidi as a sandy-coast beach. AllOverGreece supports easy car/moto/ATV/bus access, parking/short path, fine sand, shallow water, nearby tavernas/cafes/rooms, and no organized beach services. Nearby food/parking context kept; no sunbed/umbrella organized claim added.

Next popular-area confidence pass 2026-06-02: Anafi.gr and AllOverGreece directly support Klisidi as a sandy Anafi beach with very easy access by car/moto/ATV/bus, parking/short path, shallow water, natural shade from tamarisks/palms, nearby tavernas/cafes/rooms, and no organized beach services. Wind/shelter wording from source text was not imported as a static calm/protected claim. No windProfile, scoring, photos, or live calm/protected/safe claim was changed.

sourceNotes: Anafi third low/no-source batch 2026-05-27: Anafi.gr identifies Megas Potamos as a long sandy/rocky east-side beach reached from the asphalt road by a short, relatively passable path, with no organization, no shade, and no services. AllOverGreece supports isolated/no-facilities context.

Next popular-area confidence pass 2026-06-02: Anafi.gr directly supports Megas Potamos as a sandy beach after Katalimatsa with access from the road/Megas Potamos stop via the old path through Agioi Anargyroi, and AllOverGreece supports sand/pebble terrain, boat/path access, no organization, no services, and some natural shade from trees. Any wind wording from the source was not imported. Water depth was changed to medium because the reviewed sources do not document a shallow-water claim. No windProfile, scoring, photos, or live calm/protected/safe claim was changed.

sourceNotes: Popular regions source pass 2026-06-02 B: Exploring Greece directly supports Flamourou as a south-side Anafi beach below cliffs, narrow sandy strips, sand/rock seabed, unorganized status, shallow depth and difficult path access. Hard access remains encoded; coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, and live calm/protected/safe claims were not changed.
